name: InfluxDB
description: InfluxDB is an open-source time series database designed to handle high write and query loads. It is the perfect choice for storing metrics, events, and real-time analytics data from your applications and infrastructure.

paths.name: Data
paths.description: Persistent storage for InfluxDB data, configuration, and WAL files.

ports.name: HTTP API
ports.description: InfluxDB HTTP API and Web Interface port.

variables.name: Docker InfluxDB Init Mode
variables.description: Initialization mode. Use 'setup' for first-time setup or 'upgrade' for upgrading existing database.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the InfluxDB admin account.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the InfluxDB admin account (min 8 characters, must be set before first start).

variables.name: Admin Token
variables.description: API token for admin operations. Generate a secure random token or leave empty to auto-generate.

variables.name: Bucket Name
variables.description: Default bucket name for storing time-series data.

variables.name: Retention
variables.description: Default retention period in hours (0 = infinite retention).
